title: pleroma oreophilum
intro: Pleroma oreophilum, also known as the Mountain Pleroma, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Taiwan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Pleroma oreophilum is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers are also used to make herbal supplements, capsules, and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
